svg.text: Each run's start and end in the (behavioral value, forecast-move) plane
Open dot = round 1 → filled arrowhead = final round. Background field: the self-only recurrence Δ value = ρ·σ (right above the line, left below).
One straight arrow per run (no intermediate rounds). The 9 scheduled-judge-swap runs are drawn hollow (dashed, open head) — the self-only field omits their swap.
forecast one-round move ρ·σ (round agreement × spread)
OLMo risk grid + judge schedules (21 runs; 9 hollow)
Coordinates computed live (stdlib) from experiments/spread_util_unified.json: start = round-1 (value, ρ·own_spread); end = (last value + drift, last ρ·own_spread).
Endpoint convention matches spread-rollout-bakeoff.py observed(); families are the run-inventory.py names. Generator: field-value-gap-startend.py
